description_long: This house features a single-story, L-shaped layout with a mix of brick and white exterior walls. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through large windows and open sections, with some areas furnished in modern styles. The roof is predominantly flat, and the property is accented by a few palm trees and shrubs, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows providing ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a prominent door, a small overhang, and a paved approach, with no visible porch or columns. The overall design is practical and modern, with a focus on open interior spaces and functional exterior landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped house with brick and white walls, flat roof, large windows, and minimal landscaping. The design emphasizes open interiors and functional urban living.
description_view_0: This view highlights the brick facade, main entryway, and a series of large windows, with interior rooms and furnishings visible through open sections.
description_view_1: From this angle, the white-walled section and a cluster of palm trees are prominent, along with a clear view of the L-shaped layout and interior room arrangements.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear and side of the house, emphasizing the white exterior walls, green lawn, and a glimpse of the backyard area.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the side and back, revealing more of the white-walled rooms, a large window, and the transition between brick and white exterior materials.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single door with a small overhang and paved approach, no porch or columns, minimal decorative elements.
